title: Google Cloud Dataflow Worker Pool
description: Describes a pool of workers that execute pipeline transforms, including machine type, disk configuration, networking, and autoscaling behavior.

kind.description: The kind of worker pool, either harness for pipeline execution or shuffle for shuffle operations.

numWorkers.description: The initial number of worker instances in the pool.

machineType.description: The Compute Engine machine type for worker instances, such as n1-standard-4 or e2-standard-2.

diskSizeGb.description: The size in GB of the root disk for each worker instance.

diskType.description: The type of root disk for each worker instance, such as pd-standard, pd-ssd, or pd-balanced.

zone.description: The Compute Engine zone where worker instances should be created.

network.description: The name or full URL of the VPC network for worker instances.

subnetwork.description: The full URL of the VPC subnetwork for worker instances.

metadata.description: Metadata key-value pairs to set on the worker Compute Engine instances.

packages.description: Packages to install on each worker instance.

location.description: The Cloud Storage location of the package.

defaultPackageSet.description: The default package set to install on the worker instances.

autoscalingSettings.description: Settings for autoscaling the number of worker instances in a pool.

maxNumWorkers.description: The maximum number of workers to scale up to.

ipConfiguration.description: Configuration for the network IP address assignment for workers.

sdkHarnessContainerImages.description: Set of SDK harness container images for the worker pool.

useSingleCorePerContainer.description: Whether to use a single CPU core per container.

environmentId.description: The environment ID this container image is associated with.

capabilities.description: The capabilities of this SDK harness container.

teardownPolicy.description: The policy that determines when worker instances are torn down.

workerHarnessContainerImage.description: The Docker container image to use for the worker harness.
